# Project blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-05-10 by /mol:map._

## Inventory

### Module list

- `src/mollog/__init__.py` — Public package façade; re-exports the entire user-facing API and exposes `TRACE`/`DEBUG`/.../`CRITICAL` stdlib-style level constants plus `__version__`.
- `src/mollog/_context.py` — Stateless `Context` namespace wrapping a module-level `ContextVar` for thread/asyncio-safe structured fields, with a `scope()` context manager that opens a logfire span when configured.
- `src/mollog/_file_handler.py` — Three file sinks: `FileHandler` (append/overwrite), `RotatingFileHandler` (size-based), `TimedRotatingFileHandler` (interval-based).
- `src/mollog/_filter.py` — Abstract `Filter` predicate plus a `LevelFilter` range gate.
- `src/mollog/_formatter.py` — Abstract `Formatter` plus `TextFormatter`, `JSONFormatter`, and `StdlibStyleFormatter` (delegates to `logging.Formatter`); reserved-field collision handling via `_normalize_extra_fields`.
- `src/mollog/_handler.py` — Abstract `Handler` base (level gate, filter chain, lock, default `TextFormatter`) plus `StreamHandler` and `NullHandler`.
- `src/mollog/_level.py` — `Level` `IntEnum` (TRACE=5 … CRITICAL=50) with `coerce()` for str/int/enum normalization.
- `src/mollog/_logfire.py` — Optional Pydantic Logfire backend: `configure_logfire`, `is_configured`, `LogfireHandler`, and `open_span()` for `Context.scope`; soft-imports `logfire` and gracefully degrades.
- `src/mollog/_logger.py` — `Logger` class: per-name logger with handler list, hierarchy parent, level gate, dispatch loop, severity helpers, `exception`, `fire` (logfire-only path), `bind`, plus exception/stack formatting helpers.
- `src/mollog/_manager.py` — `LoggerManager` singleton (registry + hierarchy + `configure`/`shutdown`) and the module-level façade functions `get_logger`, `configure`, `shutdown`, `set_level`, and the `trace`/`debug`/`info`/`warning`/`error`/`critical`/`exception` root proxies generated by `_root_proxy`.
- `src/mollog/_queue.py` — `QueueHandler` (puts records on a `queue.Queue`/`multiprocessing.Queue`) and `QueueListener` (background-thread consumer with sentinel-based drain/stop).
- `src/mollog/_record.py` — `LogRecord` frozen-slot dataclass: immutable event with level, message, logger_name, UTC timestamp, extras dict, optional exception/stack_info strings.
- `src/mollog/_rich.py` — `RichFormatter` ANSI/colorised formatter built on `rich.Console` + `Text`, with per-level styles and lock-guarded capture.
- `src/mollog/_stdlib_bridge.py` — `StdlibBridgeHandler` (a `logging.Handler` that funnels stdlib records into `LoggerManager`), `capture_stdlib_logging`/`release_stdlib_logging` install/remove helpers, and bidirectional `stdlib_to_mollog_level` / `mollog_to_stdlib_level` mappers.

### Public surface

- `__init__.py` — User-facing exports listed in `__all__`: `Context`, `Level`, `TRACE`/`DEBUG`/`INFO`/`WARNING`/`ERROR`/`CRITICAL`, `LogRecord`, `Formatter`/`TextFormatter`/`JSONFormatter`/`RichFormatter`/`StdlibStyleFormatter`, `Filter`/`LevelFilter`, `Handler`/`StreamHandler`/`NullHandler`/`FileHandler`/`RotatingFileHandler`/`TimedRotatingFileHandler`/`QueueHandler`/`QueueListener`/`LogfireHandler`/`StdlibBridgeHandler`, `Logger`, `LoggerManager`, `configure`, `configure_logfire`, `get_logger`, `set_level`, `shutdown`, `trace`/`debug`/`info`/`warning`/`error`/`critical`/`exception`, `capture_stdlib_logging`/`release_stdlib_logging`, `__version__`.
- `_context.py` — User-facing: `Context` (classmethods `get`, `bind`, `reset`, `clear`, `scope`). Internal: module-level `_context: ContextVar` (not exported).
- `_file_handler.py` — User-facing: `FileHandler`, `RotatingFileHandler`, `TimedRotatingFileHandler`. No cross-module internal use.
- `_filter.py` — User-facing: `Filter`, `LevelFilter`. Cross-module internal: `Filter` is imported by `_handler.py`.
- `_formatter.py` — User-facing: `Formatter`, `TextFormatter`, `JSONFormatter`, `StdlibStyleFormatter`. Cross-module internal: `Formatter`, `TextFormatter` imported by `_handler.py`; `Formatter`, `StdlibStyleFormatter`, `TextFormatter` imported by `_manager.py`; `Formatter` imported by `_rich.py`. Module-private helper `_normalize_extra_fields` and `_RESERVED_FIELDS` set.
- `_handler.py` — User-facing: `Handler`, `StreamHandler`, `NullHandler`. Cross-module internal: `Handler` imported by `_file_handler.py`, `_logfire.py`, `_logger.py`, `_manager.py`, `_queue.py`; `StreamHandler` imported by `_manager.py`.
- `_level.py` — User-facing: `Level` (with `coerce()` classmethod). Used by virtually every other module.
- `_logfire.py` — User-facing: `configure_logfire`, `LogfireHandler`. Cross-module internal: `is_configured` (not exported via `__init__`), `open_span` (called by `_context.scope`); module-private `_logfire_mod`, `_CONFIGURED`, `_LEVEL_MAP`, `_INSTALL_HINT`, `_UNCONFIGURED_HINT`, `LogfireLevelName`. `LogfireHandler` is also imported lazily by `_logger.fire`.
- `_logger.py` — User-facing: `Logger`. Cross-module internal: type aliases `ExcInfo`, `ExcInfoArg` (`ExcInfoArg` imported by `_manager.py`); helper `_format_exception` is imported lazily by `_stdlib_bridge.StdlibBridgeHandler.emit`. Internal-only: `_resolve_exc_info`, `_format_stack_info`.
- `_manager.py` — User-facing: `LoggerManager`, `configure`, `get_logger`, `shutdown`, `set_level`, `trace`, `debug`, `info`, `warning`, `error`, `critical`, `exception`. Module-private factory `_root_proxy`. `LoggerManager()` is also called inside `_stdlib_bridge.StdlibBridgeHandler.emit`.
- `_queue.py` — User-facing: `QueueHandler`, `QueueListener`. Module-private: `_SENTINEL`.
- `_record.py` — User-facing: `LogRecord`. Cross-module internal: imported by `_filter.py`, `_formatter.py`, `_handler.py`, `_file_handler.py`, `_queue.py`, `_logfire.py`, `_logger.py`, `_rich.py`, `_stdlib_bridge.py` (lazy).
- `_rich.py` — User-facing: `RichFormatter`. Module-private: `_LEVEL_STYLES`, `ColorSystem` literal alias.
- `_stdlib_bridge.py` — User-facing: `StdlibBridgeHandler`, `capture_stdlib_logging`, `release_stdlib_logging` (declared in `__all__`). Cross-module internal: `mollog_to_stdlib_level` (used by `_formatter.StdlibStyleFormatter` and `_logger.set_level`), `stdlib_to_mollog_level` (internal, also in `__all__`). Module-private: `_RESERVED_STDLIB_ATTRS`, `_EMPTY_EXTRAS`, `_MOLLOG_TO_STDLIB`, `_stdlib_record_extras`.

### Style summary

- `__init__.py` — naming = lowercase module + public CapWords/snake_case re-exports; construction = re-export only, no logic except `__version__` resolution via `importlib.metadata`; errors = `PackageNotFoundError` falls back to `"0+unknown"`; explicit `__all__` enumerates the surface.
- `_context.py` — naming = PascalCase namespace class (`Context`) with `@classmethod` API; construction = instantiation explicitly forbidden via `TypeError` in `__init__`; errors = defensive `TypeError`; idiom = `from __future__ import annotations`, ContextVar token round-trip, `@contextmanager` for `scope`; lazy `import mollog._logfire` to avoid cycles.
- `_file_handler.py` — naming = PascalCase classes, snake_case methods, leading-underscore instance state (`_path`, `_file`, `_max_bytes`); construction = keyword-only `level` defaults to `Level.TRACE`, parent dirs auto-created; errors = `ValueError` for invalid `mode`/`max_bytes`/`backup_count`/`when`/`interval`; idiom = `# noqa: SIM115` for hand-managed file lifetime, `Path` everywhere.
- `_filter.py` — naming = PascalCase classes; construction = `ABC` + `@abstractmethod`; errors = none directly; minimalist contract (`filter() -> bool`).
- `_formatter.py` — naming = PascalCase classes, snake_case helpers, leading-underscore module-private (`_RESERVED_FIELDS`, `_normalize_extra_fields`); construction = `ABC` + `@abstractmethod` `format`; errors = none (delegates collision-handling to `_normalize_extra_fields`); idiom = stdlib delegation in `StdlibStyleFormatter` via `_stdlib.Formatter`/`_stdlib.LogRecord`, `Literal["%", "{", "$"]` for style.
- `_handler.py` — naming = PascalCase classes, snake_case methods; construction = `ABC` with `__init__` taking `level=Level.TRACE`, pre-creates `TextFormatter`, `threading.Lock` for emit; errors = none; idiom = context-manager protocol (`__enter__`/`__exit__`) closes; pre-emit gate (level + filters), `with self._lock: self.emit(record)`.
- `_level.py` — naming = UPPER_SNAKE enum members; construction = `IntEnum` so `Level < other_int` works; errors = `ValueError` from `coerce` with `from exc` chain; idiom = `Self` return type from `__future__`-style typing.
- `_logfire.py` — naming = UPPER_SNAKE module flag (`_CONFIGURED`), leading-underscore privates, `LogfireLevelName` `Literal`; construction = soft import with `try/except ImportError`, module-state mutation gated through `configure_logfire`; errors = `ImportError(_INSTALL_HINT)`, `RuntimeError(_UNCONFIGURED_HINT)`; idiom = `nullcontext()` as graceful-degradation default for `open_span`, `pragma: no cover` markers for ImportError fallback.
- `_logger.py` — naming = PascalCase class, snake_case methods, leading-underscore privates (`_lock`, `_bound_extra`, `_log`, `_dispatch`); construction = `__init__` with keyword-only `propagate`/`bound_extra`, `RLock` for re-entrant dispatch; errors = `RuntimeError` only in `fire` when no `LogfireHandler`; idiom = lazy `from mollog._logfire import LogfireHandler` inside `fire`, lazy stdlib + `mollog_to_stdlib_level` import inside `set_level`, `bind()` builds a view via `Logger.__new__` sharing handler list/lock.
- `_manager.py` — naming = PascalCase singleton, snake_case factory `_root_proxy`; construction = double-checked-locking singleton via class-level `_instance`/`_init_lock` and `__new__`, separate `_state_lock` (RLock) for runtime mutation; errors = `ValueError` if both `formatter` and `format` passed; idiom = `Level.coerce` for level normalization, generated wrappers via `_root_proxy` set `__name__`/`__qualname__`/`__doc__`, `replace`/`capture_stdlib` precedence rules documented in docstring.
- `_queue.py` — naming = PascalCase classes, leading-underscore class-level `_SENTINEL` tuple; construction = context-manager protocol on `QueueListener`, `daemon=True` background thread, `threading.Lock` for state; errors = `ValueError` for negative grace period, `RuntimeError` if already running; idiom = sentinel-based drain + grace-period timeout.
- `_record.py` — naming = PascalCase dataclass; construction = `@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)` with `field(default_factory=...)` for `timestamp`/`extra`; errors = immutability enforced by frozen; idiom = `datetime.now(timezone.utc)` for timezone-aware timestamps.
- `_rich.py` — naming = PascalCase formatter, leading-underscore privates and `_LEVEL_STYLES` dict, `ColorSystem` `Literal` alias; construction = keyword-only options, `Console` configured for `truecolor`, `force_terminal=True`, `soft_wrap=True`, lock-guarded capture in `format`; errors = none; idiom = `Text.assemble`, `ReprHighlighter`.
- `_stdlib_bridge.py` — naming = snake_case helpers, PascalCase handler, UPPER_SNAKE constants (`_RESERVED_STDLIB_ATTRS`, `_EMPTY_EXTRAS`, `_MOLLOG_TO_STDLIB`), explicit `__all__`; construction = subclasses `_stdlib.Handler`, lazy imports inside `emit` (`from mollog._logger import _format_exception`, `from mollog._manager import LoggerManager`, `from mollog._record import LogRecord as _MolRecord`) to break cycles; errors = broad `try/except Exception` in `emit` falling back to `self.handleError`; idiom = hot-path short-circuit via shared `_EMPTY_EXTRAS` sentinel, comment-documented intentional level-zero override of stdlib root.

### Layer roles

- `__init__.py` — Public façade.
- `_manager.py` — Manager / orchestration (singleton registry, `configure`, root-proxy stdlib-style helpers).
- `_logger.py` — Logger core (per-logger filtering, dispatch, level management, `bind`, `fire`).
- `_record.py` — Record model.
- `_handler.py` — Handler / sink (abstract base + `StreamHandler` / `NullHandler`).
- `_file_handler.py` — Handler / sink (file-backed).
- `_queue.py` — Handler / sink (queue-backed) plus a small consumer (`QueueListener`); the listener is sink-adjacent rather than a logger-core component.
- `_formatter.py` — Formatter / renderer.
- `_rich.py` — Formatter / renderer (rich-backed).
- `_filter.py` — Filter.
- `_level.py` — Level.
- `_context.py` — Context.
- `_stdlib_bridge.py` — Bridge / adapter (stdlib).
- `_logfire.py` — Bridge / adapter (logfire); also contributes a sink (`LogfireHandler`).

### Notes on layer boundaries

- `_filter.py` is consumed exclusively by `Handler.handle`, so it could collapse into the **Handler / sink** layer. Kept as its own **Filter** layer because the candidate list enumerates it.
- `_queue.py` straddles **Handler / sink** (the `QueueHandler` export) and a "transport / dispatcher" sub-role (the `QueueListener` background fan-out). Classified primarily as Handler / sink.
- `_rich.py` could be considered a **Bridge / adapter** to the third-party `rich` package. Kept under **Formatter / renderer** because its public type subclasses `Formatter` and it has no manager/registry coupling.
- `_logfire.py` is genuinely dual-role — **Bridge / adapter** *and* a sink (`LogfireHandler`). Listed under bridge primarily, with the sink role noted.
- `_manager.py` mixes Manager / orchestration with module-level proxies that `__init__.py` re-exports. Classified as Manager / orchestration; the proxies are an acknowledged lateral coupling to the public-façade layer.
- `_stdlib_bridge.mollog_to_stdlib_level` / `stdlib_to_mollog_level` arguably belong in the **Level** layer; they live with the bridge because they exist solely for stdlib interop. Kept under Bridge / adapter to match file location.
